task_completion.description: Open the cytochrome_c_multispecies.fasta file in UGENE
task_completion.visual_evidence: UGENE graphical interface is open, showing the loaded sequence file with 8 cytochrome c protein sequences visible in the project or sequence view.

task_completion.description: Conduct a multiple sequence alignment using the MUSCLE algorithm
task_completion.visual_evidence: UGENE alignment editor is visible showing aligned sequences with gaps, or a dialog box/menu indicating the MUSCLE alignment algorithm was selected and executed.

task_completion.description: Generate a pairwise identity/distance matrix in UGENE
task_completion.visual_evidence: A distance matrix or pairwise identity table is visible within the UGENE interface, showing a grid of percentage values comparing the 8 species.

task_completion.description: Export the resulting alignment in Stockholm format
task_completion.visual_evidence: UGENE export dialog showing the alignment being saved as 'cytc_alignment.sto' in the Stockholm format, or a terminal/file explorer showing the file exists in ~/UGENE_Data/results/.

task_completion.description: Export the distance matrix to a CSV file
task_completion.visual_evidence: UGENE export dialog showing the matrix being saved as 'cytc_distance_matrix.csv', or a terminal/file explorer showing the file exists in ~/UGENE_Data/results/.

task_completion.description: Document findings in cytc_analysis_report.txt with required metrics
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor showing 'cytc_analysis_report.txt' containing: sequence count (8), alignment length (112), most similar pair (Horse/Pig at ~97.1%), most divergent pair (Cannabis/Yeast at ~51.4%), Human vs others (Pig ~90.5%, Horse ~88.6%, Chick ~87.6%), and the conclusion that Pig is the most conserved animal model relative to humans.

integrity.description: The agent used the UGENE graphical interface to perform the alignment and matrix generation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the UGENE GUI open and being interacted with, rather than the agent using terminal commands (like standalone muscle CLI) or Python scripts to bypass the UGENE application.

integrity.description: The agent exported the files directly from UGENE.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for UGENE 'Save As' or 'Export' dialog boxes for the .sto and .csv files, ensuring the agent didn't just create dummy files with terminal commands like 'touch'.

integrity.description: The report data matches the generated matrix and alignment.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values typed into the report should correspond to the values visible in the UGENE distance matrix and alignment length on screen, proving the agent read the actual output.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct MUSCLE alignment length is 112 positions. The most similar species pair is Horse (P00004) and Pig (P62895) at ~97.1% identity. The most divergent pair is Cannabis (P00053) and Yeast (P00044) at ~51.4% identity. Relative to Human (P99999), the Pig (P62895) sequence is the most highly conserved animal model at ~90.5% identity, followed by Horse (~88.6%) and Chick (~87.6%). The final report must identify Pig as the most conserved animal model relative to humans.
